name: WmiEvent - WmiEventConsumer activity detected
definition: Sysmon Event ID 20 records WmiEvent - WmiEventConsumer activity detected.
trigger_scenarios: The event is emitted when the configured Sysmon operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: ConsumerType CommandLineEventConsumer with a CommandLineTemplate invoking powershell.exe or a C:\\Users\\ path is executable WMI persistence.
Use the initiating image and ProcessGuid to join Event ID 1 command-line context.
Use the timestamp to correlate with related activity.

false_positives: Approved administration, management agents, and deployment tools can generate this telemetry.
Baseline expected hosts, signed binaries, and change windows before suppression.

attck_mapping.technique_name: Event Triggered Execution: Windows Management Instrumentation Event Subscription

detection_notes: ConsumerType CommandLineEventConsumer with a CommandLineTemplate invoking powershell.exe or a C:\\Users\\ path is executable WMI persistence. This is a T1546.003 Event Triggered Execution: Windows Management Instrumentation Event Subscription signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the initiating Image, ProcessGuid, and logon context before closing.
kql_snippet:
Sysmon
| where EventID == 20
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Image, ProcessGuid
spl_snippet: index=sysmon EventCode=20 | table _time, host, Image, ProcessGuid
